reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para cargar combustibles. Personal amable y atento. Baños en muy buen estado y limpios. Lo único que le falta son opciones de comida y cafetería en la tienda. Por lo demás recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Good place to refuel. Friendly and helpful staff. Restrooms are very clean and in good condition. The only thing missing is food options and a cafeteria in the store. Otherwise, recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMXJuWm1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Great gas station, YPF standard. Restrooms, Wi-Fi, snacks. Last stop before entering Chile, or first stop when entering Argentina from Chile. If the border is closed, the place serves as a rest stop until it reopens. The location is over 4000 m above sea level, so it's usually cold, even in summer.

(Original)
Ótimo posto, padrão YPF. Banheiros, wi-fi, lanches. Última parada antes de se entrar no Chile, ou primeira parada ao entrar na Argentina vindo do Chile. Se a fronteira estiver fechada o local serve para um descanso até a reabertura. O local está a mais de 4000 m de altitude, então normalmente é frio, mesmo no verão.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNU5MSlZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo bien, tiene posnet para tarjetas. Buen servicio en el bar, tiene wifi.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine, they have a card reader. Good service at the bar, and they have Wi-Fi.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNdV9HNXZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) It doesn't even seem like a gas station in the middle of "nowhere," far from everything. The price of fuel and products in the convenience store isn't overpriced, the snacks are good, the restrooms are clean, and the Wi-Fi is good. Without a doubt, it's a good place to stop before crossing the Passo.

(Original)
Nem parece que é um posto no meio do "nada", distante de tudo. O preço do combustível e dis produtos na conveniência não são superfaturados, os lanches são bons, os banheiros são limpos e a wifi é  boa. Sem dúvida é um bom local de parada antes de fazer a travessia do Passo.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNcW9EeWJnEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) It's a shame they only accept Argentine pesos.
